# Software Planning

Use planning when scope is multi-file, risky, or unclear.

## Planning flow
1. Define concrete goal
2. Break into todos with complexity
3. Track status continuously
4. Re-plan when scope changes

## Output
- Task checklist
- Dependencies and risk flags
- Completion criteria
